category_sources: source_facts.description says Unit testing framework for C++; official CppUnit docs describe it as a testing framework.
display_name_sources: Official documentation page title is CppUnit - The Unit Testing Library; source_facts.name is cppunit.
docs_sources: Official CppUnit documentation page is hosted under people.freedesktop.org; source_facts.homepage is the freedesktop project page.
repo_sources: Official freedesktop cgit page for libreoffice/cppunit lists the repository and tags including cppunit releases.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a C++ unit testing framework; official docs describe usage and library license.
